overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a character with red hair navigating a futuristic neon-lit city. The sequence includes street-level walking through commercial districts, entering a convenience store, ascending to an elevated walkway, and engaging in melee combat while overlooking traffic below.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city intersection with crosswalk and holographic billboards

events.description: begins walking from vehicle side into busy futuristic street intersection
crossing multi-lane street with yellow zebra crossing markings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the intersection, navigating between pedestrians and observing the towering skyscrapers

notable_agents.action: black futuristic car parked at the curb near the crosswalk

entered.detail: tall dark glass towers with neon accents and industrial structures
large holographic advertisement displaying a blue-haired figure with Japanese text
yellow-railed elevated roadway structure curving between buildings
yellow striped pedestrian crossing on dark asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking through a sunlit futuristic city intersection surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers. A large holographic geisha billboard dominates the right side while the character crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk, navigating around other pedestrians and parked vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway overpass

events.description: enters shaded area beneath the elevated highway structure
lighting shifts from bright sunlight to shadowed underpass with artificial neon illumination

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass toward a convenience store with neon signage

entered.detail: futuristic convenience store with '25h/7' neon signage and curved white facade
wall with bright pink circular neon decorations and Japanese text
concrete ceiling and support columns of the elevated highway above

segments.scene_description: Moving into the shadow of an elevated highway overpass, the lighting shifts to a mix of shadow and neon. The character approaches a 24-hour convenience store with distinctive pink neon graffiti on its walls, while the surrounding crowd thins out.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic convenience store interior with magazine racks and vending machines

events.description: enters the convenience store through automatic glass doors
exits through back of store into open courtyard area

agents.ego_description: walking through the convenience store past shelves and exiting to a back courtyard with stairs

notable_agents.action: store clerk standing behind the counter arranging items

entered.detail: tall racks filled with magazines and digital tablets
checkout counter with display screens and merchandise
open concrete plaza with vending machines and stairway access
wide staircase with yellow side walls leading upward

segments.scene_description: The character enters the convenience store, passing magazine racks and a checkout counter, then exits through the back into a courtyard. The environment transitions from neon-lit interior to a concrete back area with a prominent yellow staircase leading upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor staircase ascending to elevated pedestrian walkway

events.description: begins ascending the concrete stairs to the elevated walkway
reaches the top of stairs, opening to wide city overlook view

agents.ego_description: climbing the yellow-railed stairs while looking up at the towering skyscrapers above

entered.detail: concrete pedestrian bridge with rusty metal railings overlooking the street
bright yellow safety barriers lining the staircase and walkway

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the wide concrete staircase with bright yellow railings, transitioning from the enclosed courtyard to an elevated walkway. Upon reaching the top, the view opens to reveal the sprawling cityscape with towering skyscrapers and busy streets below.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with combat encounter and city overlook

events.description: engages in melee combat with a pedestrian, knocking them to the ground
stops at railing to look down at the multi-lane street traffic below

agents.ego_description: attacking a pedestrian on the walkway then pausing to look over the railing at the street below

notable_agents.action: pedestrian being struck and falling to the ground during combat

entered.detail: rusted metal barrier providing view of the traffic below
multi-lane street with moving vehicles visible from above

segments.scene_description: On the elevated walkway, the character engages in sudden combat with a pedestrian, knocking them down. The character then stops at the rusty railing to overlook the busy multi-lane street below, observing the flow of traffic between the futuristic towers.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated commercial walkway with holographic advertisements

events.description: resumes walking along the elevated pathway away from the overlook

agents.ego_description: continuing along the elevated walkway, passing other pedestrians and observing the city architecture

entered.detail: large advertisement displaying the Delamain logo on a dark building facade
curved elevated highway ramp connecting distant buildings

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the elevated pathway, moving past holographic advertisements including a prominent Delamain billboard. The walkway provides an elevated view of the dense commercial district with its mix of glass towers and elevated infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, bustling city intersection up to a high-altitude walkway overlooking a dense futuristic metropolis. It begins with the character crossing a sunlit intersection beneath a towering holographic geisha, moving through crowds and glass skyscrapers before slipping into the neon-tinged shadows of an elevated highway overpass. The scene then shifts as the character enters a convenience store and exits through a back courtyard, transitioning from the neon interior to a concrete area where they ascend a wide yellow staircase. Upon reaching the top, the view opens from the enclosed courtyard to a sprawling cityscape, where the character engages in a brief melee struggle before pausing at a rusty railing to observe the multi-lane traffic below. Finally, the camera follows the character along the elevated pathway, passing holographic Delamain advertisements while maintaining a panoramic view of the commercial district's glass towers and infrastructure.
